# Code of Conduct

Be respectful, direct, and constructive.

Unacceptable behavior includes harassment, threats, personal attacks, sustained disruption, or publishing private information without permission.

Maintainers may edit, hide, or remove comments, issues, pull requests, or other contributions that violate this code. Repeated or severe violations may result in a ban from project spaces.

Report concerns through the project maintainer's GitHub profile or by opening a private security advisory when the concern involves a vulnerability.
